name: chainscope
title: ChainScope
description: Decode Ethereum and Solana transactions, calldata, and addresses from your clipboard, with ABI resolution, proxy and multisig detection, and event-log decoding.
author: auralshin

commands.name: decode
commands.title: Decode
commands.subtitle: ChainScope
commands.description: Reads the clipboard and works out what you pasted (tx hash, calldata, address, ENS name, number, or Solana signature), then decodes it.

commands.name: convert-units
commands.title: Convert Units
commands.subtitle: ChainScope
commands.description: wei, gwei, ether, hex to decimal, and bytes32 padding, updated as you type.

commands.name: hash-selector
commands.title: Hash & Selector
commands.subtitle: ChainScope
commands.description: keccak256 of a string and the 4-byte function selector / event topic for a signature.

commands.name: search-explorer
commands.title: Search Explorer
commands.subtitle: ChainScope
commands.description: Detects an address, tx hash, or block and opens it in a block explorer.

commands.name: search-tokens
commands.title: Search Tokens
commands.subtitle: ChainScope
commands.description: Search popular tokens by symbol, name, or address across EVM chains and Solana, with verification and audit info.

commands.name: search-chains
commands.title: Search Chains
commands.subtitle: ChainScope
commands.description: Search every supported chain by name or id, including your custom chains. Copy the id or RPC, or open the explorer.

preferences.name: etherscanApiKey
preferences.title: Etherscan API Key
preferences.description: Optional. Etherscan V2 unified key (works across chains). When unset, ABI resolution falls back to Sourcify, then the openchain.xyz signature database.

preferences.name: defaultChain
preferences.title: Default Chain
preferences.description: Chain used for tx fetch, ABI resolution, proxy reads, and explorer links.

preferences.name: customChainId
preferences.title: Custom Chain ID
preferences.description: Optional. Any EVM chain ID (e.g. 324 for zkSync, 534352 for Scroll). Overrides Default Chain. The RPC and explorer are resolved automatically for any chain viem knows.

preferences.name: rpcUrl
preferences.title: RPC URL Override
preferences.description: Optional. Custom JSON-RPC endpoint for the selected chain. Required for chain IDs viem does not bundle.

preferences.name: customChains
preferences.title: Custom Chains / RPCs
preferences.description: Optional JSON to add chains or override RPC/explorer. Example: [{"id":1,"rpc":"https://my-node"},{"id":7777777,"name":"Zora","rpc":"https://rpc.zora.energy","explorer":"https://explorer.zora.energy"}]

preferences.name: solanaCluster
preferences.title: Solana Cluster
preferences.description: Cluster used when decoding Solana (SVM) signatures and addresses.

preferences.name: solanaRpc
preferences.title: Solana RPC URL
preferences.description: Optional. Solana JSON-RPC endpoint (also works for SVM rollups like Eclipse). Defaults to a public endpoint.
